description: murcia comes up with this tribute to minimalism in a lovely shade of brown. Crafted in a soft, curvy silhouette, this bag references the classic satchel in its styling. This piece transcends the now-in now-out trends and is a classic must-have! Height: 36 cm Width: 28 cm Depth: 12 cm Two-tone leatherette upper Two handles One zippered compartment at the back Two zippered pockets on the front and two zippered compartments on the sides Rivet details on the front for style Three main compartments with two pouches in the first compartment and a zippered pocket in the third compartment Care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
